commentaries.author: Cornelius a Lapide
commentaries.content: When therefore he was risen from the dead, his disciples remembered that he had said this unto them; and they believed the scripture, and the word which Jesus had said. Cornelius a Lapide When therefore He was risen, &c. They believed the Scripture, which foretold that Christ would rise from the dead. This, which they did not previously understand, they understood when they saw it actually fulfilled in the resurrection of Christ. Such a Scripture is that verse of the Psalm (xvi10), "Thou shalt not leave My soul in hell, nor suffer Thine Holy One to see corruption.

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: But at the time when this was spoken, the Jews were perplexed as to what it might mean, and cast about to discover, saying,
